scripts.build:shared: npm -w shared/shared-types run build && npm -w shared/circuit-breaker run build && npm -w shared/config run build && npm -w shared/redis run build && npm -w shared/redis-client run build && npm -w shared/kafka-client run build && npm -w shared/rabbitmq-client run build && npm -w shared/tracing run build && npm -w shared/common run build && npm -w shared/bootstrap run build
scripts.build:apps: npm run build:auth && npm run build:comic && npm run build:config && npm run build:web-api && npm run build:iam && npm run build:cms && npm run build:notification && npm run build:post && npm run build:storage
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:apps
scripts.prisma:generate: npm run prisma:generate:auth && npm run prisma:generate:comic && npm run prisma:generate:config && npm run prisma:generate:iam && npm run prisma:generate:cms && npm run prisma:generate:notification && npm run prisma:generate:post
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm -w apps/auth-service run prisma:migrate && npm -w apps/comic-service run prisma:migrate && npm -w apps/config-service run prisma:migrate && npm -w apps/iam-service run prisma:migrate && npm -w apps/cms-service run prisma:migrate && npm -w apps/notification-service run prisma:migrate && npm -w apps/post-service run prisma:migrate
scripts.prisma:deploy: npm -w apps/auth-service run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm -w apps/comic-service run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm -w apps/config-service run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm -w apps/iam-service run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm -w apps/cms-service run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm -w apps/notification-service run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm -w apps/post-service run prisma:migrate:deploy
scripts.docker:infra: docker compose up -d kafka kafka-ui rabbitmq auth-db comic-db notification-db config-db post-db cms-db iam-db auth-redis comic-redis notification-redis post-redis web-api-redis iam-redis jaeger
scripts.docker:infra:down: docker compose stop kafka kafka-ui auth-db comic-db notification-db config-db post-db cms-db iam-db auth-redis comic-redis notification-redis post-redis web-api-redis iam-redis jaeger
